issues.description: Abnormal high-pitch squealing and excessive vibration at spindle rpm above 2000. Potential bearing wear.

history.notes: Breakdown raised.
Self-assigned for immediate review.
Taking down casing to inspect spindle bearing state.
Spoke repacked, grease injected, vibration checks clear.
Machine verified under test load. Closing ticket.

issues.resolutionRemarks: Dismantled shield cover. Cleaned spindle assembly. Replaced dry lubrication grease with high-temp industrial lithium grease and adjusted sensor alignment. RPM test run up to 4000 successful.

possibleCauses: Lack of grease in spindle bearing

issues.description: Main steam boiler heater output dropping pressure from 300 bar down to 180 bar during active strokes. Hydraulic oil pool detected in tray.

history.notes: Breakdown raised.
Assigned by maintenance supervisor.
Procuring seal ring and oil canister from inventory.
Seals replaced and system test completed. Awaiting supervisor closure confirmation.
Ticket auto-closed. Resolution deemed resolved successfully after 2 hours timeout limit exceeded without supervisor rejection.

issues.resolutionRemarks: Reformed pressure seal ring on main ram. Refilled 12 liters of ISO 46 hydraulic system oil. Tested under pressure, steady holding at 295 bar.

stepsToFix: Inspect main cylinder collar for leakage
Isolate slide pilot valve and check pressure
Bleed air from manifold and cycle cylinder
possibleCauses: Worn main ram cylinder double-acting lip seal

stepsToFix: Disconnect tool power, discharge backup bus for 2 mins
Verify shielding braid on communication cable
Substitute secondary tool body to isolate hardware issue
possibleCauses: External electromagnetic noise interfering with RS485 connection

history.notes: Raised critical assembly block.
Assigned.
Consulting manufacturer parameter manual. Checking controller logic voltage.
⚠️ CRITICAL: SLA limit of 60 minutes crossed. Raising escalation flag!

issues.description: Device calibration fault E-104 flashing. Controller won't hold torque program parameters, resets to zero during assembly cyles.

history.notes: Breakdown ticket initiated on Granulation 1. SLA set to 120 minutes.
Ticket assigned to Engineer Vikram Singh (+91 76543 21098).
Repair operations started. Diagnostic checking in progress.
⚠️ CRITICAL: SLA limit of 120 minutes crossed. Raising escalation flag!
Breakdown ticket initiated on Change Room. SLA set to 120 minutes.
Ticket assigned to Engineer Vikram Singh (+91 76543 21098).
⚠️ CRITICAL: SLA limit of 120 minutes crossed. Raising escalation flag!
